summary: Add the local-first authentication and organization creation flow that turns a signed-in user into the first admin of a new organization.

steps.name: create-core-schema
steps.summary: Added Drizzle configuration, core onboarding schema tables, role enum, and bootstrap helpers proving organization creation, first village creation, and membership linking.

steps.name: implement-auth-foundation
steps.summary: Added Supabase browser/server helpers, login and signup screens, and route guards that redirect authenticated users toward onboarding or the dashboard.

steps.name: implement-organization-onboarding
steps.summary: Implemented a protected organization onboarding form, transaction-shaped organization creation service, metadata sync for membership routing, and a completion screen.
